## What does this PR do?

Brief description of the new/updated skill, example, or fix.

## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Update to an existing skill
- [ ] New / updated example
- [ ] Installer / tooling
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `node scripts/validate-skills.mjs` passes
- [ ] New skill has `name` + `description: Use when ...` frontmatter
- [ ] `name` matches the directory name
- [ ] Includes concrete React + Tailwind + shadcn/ui patterns and a "Pitfalls" section
- [ ] Accessibility considered (focus, ARIA, keyboard)
- [ ] Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
